title: Visual Abominations (FREE YTP MUSIC DOWNLOAD!)
description:
http://vorhias.multiply.com/music/item/50/Visual_Abominations

A Mediashare-type .zip file link will come eventually too, with a few extra stuff bundled with it.

To anyone who feels like it: I give permission to anyone who wants to use the music to make a YTPMV using the source that normally would sync up to the original material. (Except of course Handsome Volcano Rocks, Egghead, and Jungle Toast, since they obviously already have videos.)
